title: Skill Bundle Manifest
description: Canonical manifest for a governed HELM skill bundle, covering lifecycle state, risk classification, capability requirements, and policy references.

id.description: Unique identifier for this skill bundle.

version.description: Semver version string for this bundle.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this skill does.

entry_point.description: Entry point path or symbol within the bundle.

state.description: Lifecycle state of the skill bundle.

self_mod_class.description: Self-modification class — C0 is read-only, C3 is full self-mutation.

risk_class.description: Risk classification label (e.g. LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH, CRITICAL).

sandbox_profile.description: Reference to the sandbox policy profile applied during execution.

capabilities.description: List of capability identifiers required by this skill.

policy_profile_ref.description: Reference to the policy profile governing this skill.

artifact_manifest_ref.description: Reference to the artifact manifest for this bundle.

sbom_ref.description: Reference to the Software Bill of Materials for this bundle.

bundle_hash.description: SHA-256 content hash of the bundle archive.

signature_ref.description: Reference to the cryptographic signature over this manifest.
